narrative_beat: Medium matemático anos 40 com equações P&B flutuando, fórmula dourada em primeiro plano

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a medium three-quarter shot of a mid-twentieth-century mathematician in a vintage brown suit, rendered in rich warm colors, seated at a wooden desk
subject.focal_point: a piece of paper in his hands glowing with a golden formula
subject.secondary: Giant desaturated equations float in the air around him; warm lateral lamp light illuminates his face.

composition.foreground: mathematician and paper in rich warm tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white equations floating and study walls

lighting.key_light: warm desk lamp from upper right

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: equation as origin of all modern surveillance
symbolism.secondary: paper as tablet of new law

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
